I'm Niklas. I currently spend my days at ERNW diving deep into offensive security.
When I'm not at work, you'll usually find me reading one of 10 unfinished books, tinkering with new tech, or documenting the "aha!" moments I have along the way.

I've built this site to be a bit of a digital library. Everything you see here, the tutorials, the research, and the random field notes, is my own work, put together with a lot of care (although I'll regularly reorganize things because ADHD kicks in).

Why the name Prospero? Well, if you're a Warhammer 40k fan, you'll recognize it as the planet of scholars and massive libraries. It's a bit of an obsession of mine. I wanted this blog to capture that same spirit: a place where knowledge is gathered, shared, and valued.
This blog is an ever-evolving passion project, and I have some pretty big ambitions for where it's headed in 2026 and beyond. Thanks for stopping by.
